correctness.notes: Theorem 2 / \eqref{eq:vlp}: The displayed finite response-type LP \eqref{eq:vlp} is missing. The reproduced LP is: optimize over rho_{t,a}>=0 the objective sum_{a in A_lambda}(rho_{0,a}+rho_{1,a}) ell_a(P), where ell_a(P)=sum_m{q_{m|1}a_{m,1}-q_{m|0}a_{m,0}}, subject to sum_a rho_{0,a}=p_0, sum_a rho_{1,a}=p_1, sum_a rho_{0,a}a_{m,0}=p_0 r_{0,m}, and sum_a rho_{1,a}a_{m,1}=p_1 r_{1,m} for m=0,1. The note references this LP and its basis matrices, but does not state these objective and constraint terms.

perItemFindings.label: vertex
perItemFindings.one_line: [serious] Theorem 2 / \eqref{eq:vlp}: The displayed finite response-type LP \eqref{eq:vlp} is missing. The reproduced LP is: optimize over rho_{t,a}>=0 the objective sum_{a in A_lambda}(rho_{0,a}+rho_{1,a}) ell_a(P), where ell_a(P)=sum_m{q_{m|1}a_{m,1}-q_{m|0}a_{m,0}}, subject to sum_a rho_{0,a}=p_0, sum_a rho_{1,a}=p_1, sum_a rho_{0,a}a_{m,0}=p_0 r_{0,m}, and sum_a rho_{1,a}a_{m,1}=p_1 r_{1,m} for m=0,1. The note references this LP and its basis matrices, but does not state these objective and constraint terms. → The endpoint formula U(lambda;P)=max_B c_B^T A_B^{-1}b and L(lambda;P)=min_B c_B^T A_B^{-1}b is not mathematically defined from the text as written; adding the missing LP display and ell_a definition should repair the theorem without changing the derived claim.

verbatim_critique:
D0.5.1 (math referee) found load-bearing correctness defects — re-derive the flagged step(s):
[serious, conjecture:vertex] Theorem 2 / \eqref{eq:vlp}: The displayed finite response-type LP \eqref{eq:vlp} is missing. The reproduced LP is: optimize over rho_{t,a}>=0 the objective sum_{a in A_lambda}(rho_{0,a}+rho_{1,a}) ell_a(P), where ell_a(P)=sum_m{q_{m|1}a_{m,1}-q_{m|0}a_{m,0}}, subject to sum_a rho_{0,a}=p_0, sum_a rho_{1,a}=p_1, sum_a rho_{0,a}a_{m,0}=p_0 r_{0,m}, and sum_a rho_{1,a}a_{m,1}=p_1 r_{1,m} for m=0,1. The note references this LP and its basis matrices, but does not state these objective and constraint terms.. Fix: The endpoint formula U(lambda;P)=max_B c_B^T A_B^{-1}b and L(lambda;P)=min_B c_B^T A_B^{-1}b is not mathematically defined from the text as written; adding the missing LP display and ell_a definition should repair the theorem without changing the derived claim.

Referee notes: I reproduced the collapse, nesting, counterexample, finite response-type reduction, converse construction, and fixed-lambda inference expansion. The algebraic derivations check out, but the load-bearing finite LP referenced as \eqref{eq:vlp} is absent from the note, so Theorem 2's endpoint formula is not actually stated as written.
